metadata.title: Ground truth: NTC thermistor divider at 50 C (R-vs-T shift)
metadata.description: The same NTC 10k / fixed 10k divider off a 5V rail as thermistor_divider, but the NTC value is now its resistance at 50 C (3.563k from the Beta model). The tap rises from 2.500V at 25 C to ~3.686V at 50 C, demonstrating the negative-temperature-coefficient behavior. The window is +/-2% to absorb the documented Beta-vs-datasheet divergence away from 25 C. Behavioral parameterized-resistor stand-in.
metadata.author: issue-105

test.description: Thermistor at 50 C: R ~ 3.563k (Beta model), tap ~ 3.686V.
